author: doll-agent
content:
Add svd_hermitian(a) function in ferray-linalg/src/decomp/svd.rs that routes through eigh and reconstructs the SVD: singular values = |eigenvalues| sorted descending; U = sign-fixed eigenvector matrix (columns flipped for negative eigenvalues); Vt = transpose of unsigned eigenvector matrix. Same return shape as svd. Faster than full SVD because eigh exploits symmetry and operates on one triangle.

Added as a sibling function rather than a hermitian= parameter on svd because adding a parameter would break ~10 call sites; svd_hermitian is opt-in. 5 tests covering diagonal, singular-value match vs full SVD, U*diag(S)*Vt == A reconstruction, non-square rejection, negative-definite matrix → positive singular values.
